svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="VkFwjUBgWxdA8WAn76fI"> <mxGraphModel dx="890" dy="611" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TD
 %% Define styles for clarity
 classDef client fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
 classDef api fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
 classDef worker fill:#fbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
 classDef db fill:#bfb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
 classDef external fill:#fbb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
 classDef storage fill:#ddd,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;

 %% Nodes
 User([User / Client]) ::: client
 FastAPI[FastAPI Server\n(API Container)] ::: api
 Redis[(Redis)\nMessage Broker & Result Backend] ::: db
 Celery[Celery Worker\n(Worker Container)] ::: worker
 PostgreSQL[(PostgreSQL)\nDatabase Container] ::: db
 Gemini([Gemini 2.5 Flash\n(External LLM API)]) ::: external
 Volume[(Shared Docker Volume\n/uploads)] ::: storage

 %% Request flows
 User -- \"1. Uploads transactions.csv\nPOST /jobs/upload\" --> FastAPI
 
 FastAPI -- \"2. Saves CSV file\" --> Volume
 FastAPI -- \"3. Creates Job record\n(status: pending)\" --> PostgreSQL
 FastAPI -- \"4. Enqueues background task\" --> Redis
 FastAPI -- \"5. Returns job_id instantly\" --> User
 
 Redis -- \"6. Dequeues task\" --> Celery
 
 Celery -- \"7. Reads CSV file\" --> Volume
 Celery -- \"8. Updates Job\n(status: processing)\" --> PostgreSQL
 Celery -- \"9. Cleans data & flags anomalies\" --> Celery
 Celery -- \"10. Batches uncategorized rows\" --> Gemini
 Gemini -- \"11. Returns Categories\n& JSON Summary\" --> Celery
 
 Celery -- \"12. Saves parsed Transactions\n& JobSummary to DB\" --> PostgreSQL
 Celery -- \"13. Updates Job\n(status: completed)\" --> PostgreSQL
 
 %% Polling Flow
 User -. \"14. Polls GET /jobs/{job_id}/status\" .-> FastAPI
 FastAPI -. \"15. Reads Status\" .-> PostgreSQL
 
 User -. \"16. Fetches GET /jobs/{job_id}/results\" .-> FastAPI
 FastAPI -. \"17. Reads clean data, anomalies & summary\" .-> PostgreSQL",
 "config": null
}" id="G47jvNvj2nKmpVrKVWCy-185"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="670" width="2140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="User / Client" mermaidId="n:User" mermaidBaseStyle="html=1;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;arcSize=50;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=light-dark(#ECECFF,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#9370DB,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" mermaidBaseValue="User / Client" id="G47jvNvj2nKmpVrKVWCy-186"> <mxCell parent="G47jvNvj2nKmpVrKVWCy-185" style="html=1;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;arcSize=50;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=light-dark(#ECECFF,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#9370DB,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="49" width="143" x="1047" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="FastAPI Server
